mosques.name: Muslim Neighbour Nexus
mosques.address: 3553 Lake Shore Blvd W, Etobicoke, ON M8W 1P4
mosques.description: Registered non-profit in Mississauga serving approximately 10,000 Muslims in the Churchill Meadows and Lisgar communities with a dome-structure masjid opened in 2019.

mosques.name: Oshawa Mosque (Masjid Hamza)
mosques.address: 67 Bond St W, Oshawa, ON L1G 1A3
mosques.description: First purpose-built masjid in Oshawa, opened in 2012, serving the local Muslim community with daily prayers, Jumu'ah, educational lectures, and licensed Nikah services.

mosques.name: Masjidur Rahmah
mosques.description: Sunni mosque in downtown Toronto's Regent Park neighbourhood operated by the Central Toronto Islamic Foundation, hosting a madrassah with full-time Hifz and community programs.
